---
title: "Historical warnings"
listing:
  type: table
  fields: [location, title, ice, date]
  field-display-names:
    title: "Warning Type"
    ice: "Status"
    location: "Location"
  contents: 
    - "warnings/**.yml"
  sort: "date desc"
---

<!-- Table of all warnings: https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-listings.html -->

<!--   contents: 
    - "warnings/*.*md"
    - "warnings/_archived.yml" -->
